message.content:
@startuml
title Virologist wear gloves

participant "attackerVirologist:Virologist" as attacker
participant "v: Virologist" as v
participant "glovesOnVirologist:Gloves" as gloves

attacker -> v : attack(forgetAgent:Agent, attackerVirologist:Virologist)
v -> gloves : defense(forgetAgent:Agent,v:Virologist, attackerVirologist:Virologist)
gloves -> attacker : attack(forgetAgent:Agent, attackerVirologist:Virologist,v:Virologist)
gloves -> gloves : decreaseTTL()
gloves --> gloves

opt [life==0]
gloves -> gloves : discard(v:Virologist)
gloves --> gloves
end

gloves --> v
v --> attacker

@enduml
